text: All comparables have been found on the eastside of Normal, IL and were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar location, design, age, quality, condition, GLA, and room count. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 4.2% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its quality. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its enclosed porch and lack of a fence. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, basement, and basement finished room count. See Comparable #4.
